Enumeration Case# kUSBInformationDeviceIsAttachedToEnclosure

Mac Catalyst 18.4+macOS 10.7+

```

```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/usbdeviceinformationbits/kusbinformationdeviceisattachedtoenclosure#discussion)

The hub port to which the USB device is connected has a USB connector on the enclosure
